changes.summary: Optional hash used to trigger resource updates when external values change; alternative to file_content_hash for controlling when updates run.
No longer settable in configuration; now computed only (was previously optional and computed).
Exported flow configurations use update_trigger_hash instead of file_content_hash to trigger updates.
Optional boolean (default false) that stores the OAuth client secret in Terraform state as a sensitive output when set to true.
Populated in Terraform state only when expose_client_secret is true; otherwise remains empty in state.
client_id is now populated during read operations.
When contacts_filepath is empty, the bulk contact upload step is skipped instead of failing with an error.
label_names values are exported as references to genesyscloud_knowledge_label resources instead of plain label name strings, ensuring correct resource creation order.
Added support for the mx-central-1 region (maps to mxc1.pure.cloud).
Added support for the ap-southeast-1 region (maps to apse1.pure.cloud).
